title: agathosma brevifolia
intro: Agathosma brevifolia, also known as the 'broad-leaved barwood', is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It is native to the Western and Eastern Cape provinces of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. Agathosma brevifolia can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
